zotero.abstractNote: We present ELITE, a novel framework for efficient and high-fidelity head avatar reconstruction from a monocular video. Existing methods often struggle with the trade-off between reconstruction quality and training efficiency, or require extensive per-subject optimization. ELITE addresses these challenges by introducing a learned initialization strategy combined with test-time generative adaptation. By leveraging a pre-trained generative model, our approach learns a robust prior for head geometry and appearance, which is then refined during test-time to capture subject-specific details. This dual-stage process enables rapid convergence and superior visual quality compared to state-of-the-art methods. We demonstrate the effectiveness of ELITE on various challenging sequences, showing its capability to produce realistic head avatars with expressive facial motions.
